title: Intermittent auth failures isolated to one availability zone after egress policy change
summary: Login and token refresh requests failed intermittently, but only for a subset of pods. The surface symptom looked like a flaky downstream identity provider, yet the actual RCA requires correlating AZ-scoped error concentration, healthy dependency probes, and a network policy rollout that blocked mTLS egress from nodes in one zone.
operational_context: A node rotation at 08:05Z shifted more auth-api pods into availability zone us-east-1c.
A network policy deployment at 08:17Z tightened east-west and egress destinations for workloads using the auth namespace.
